name: HWR_PUBLICATION_B
description: The publication table stores profile publication data.

columns.Name: PUBLICATION_ID
columns.Comments: This is the primary key for the publication table.

columns.Name: SOURCE_ID
columns.Comments: The Id of the source for this publication.

columns.Name: AUTHORS
columns.Comments: The list of authors for this publication.

columns.Name: PUBLICATION_DATE
columns.Comments: The publication date of this publication.

columns.Name: TITLE
columns.Comments: The original title of this publication.

columns.Name: PUBLICATION_TYPE
columns.Comments: The publication type of this publication.

columns.Name: URL
columns.Comments: The URL for accessing this publication.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
